cards.downstream_effect: Canonicalizes user text before routing and retrieval.
cards.why: Deterministic preprocessing; retained as core routing support.

cards.downstream_effect: Extracts tokens, quoted entities, and intent words for downstream ranking.
cards.why: Low-cost deterministic signal used by ranking and templates.

cards.downstream_effect: Ranks schema/API candidates using query-token overlap and metadata relevance.
cards.why: Core ranking signal; effects are embedded in current packaged metrics.

cards.downstream_effect: Deduplicates and selects a single plan from deterministic planning candidates.
cards.why: Preserves deterministic single-plan execution.

cards.downstream_effect: Builds compact per-query metadata/context for planning.
cards.output: metadata.json and filled system prompt context
cards.why: Needed to keep prompt context compact and deterministic.

cards.downstream_effect: Classifies route type, answer shape, and domain family.
cards.why: Core deterministic intent layer.

cards.downstream_effect: Fast prompt-level route gate for SQL/API need and risk.
cards.why: Promoted as routing safety layer.

cards.downstream_effect: Grounds with local SQL first, then verifies with API where needed.
cards.why: Best current strict score and correctness among packaged strategies.

cards.downstream_effect: Generate validated SQL for recurring local-data query families.
cards.why: Reusable templates are part of current SQL score.

cards.downstream_effect: Generate endpoint-catalog-valid API calls.
cards.input: endpoint catalog, route policy, grounded IDs
cards.why: Reusable endpoint templates drive current API score.

cards.downstream_effect: Builds constrained SQL/API steps from route and context.
cards.why: Core packaged execution path.

cards.downstream_effect: Runs validated SQL/API calls and records trajectory evidence.
cards.why: Required packaged runtime component.

cards.downstream_effect: Defines allowed Adobe API endpoints and validation metadata.
cards.input: endpoint templates and planned API calls
cards.why: Safety boundary for API calls.

cards.downstream_effect: Ranks endpoint families from reusable intent features.
cards.why: Ranking is used; broader tie-break changes were not promoted.

cards.downstream_effect: Shadow-tests reusable endpoint/schema routing rules.
cards.input: query vocabulary, catalog metadata, path shapes
cards.why: Kept shadow-only because measurable improvement was false.

cards.downstream_effect: Generates deterministic alternative plans for isolated search.
cards.why: No broad runtime promotion; used for diagnostics/trials.

cards.downstream_effect: Scores isolated candidates and selects only safe improvements.
cards.input: candidate plans and strict offline scores
cards.why: Kept isolated unless trial gates pass.

cards.downstream_effect: Tests concise answer-shape rewrites with row-level A/B diagnostics.
cards.why: Not a packaged default; isolated trial was below 0.75 target.

cards.downstream_effect: Creates evidence-cited dry-run-safe answer rewrites.
cards.input: recorded evidence, endpoint params, dry-run labels
cards.why: Safe rows feed isolated trials; not final promoted behavior.

cards.downstream_effect: Conservatively skips API only when SQL fully answers and API score is not needed.
cards.input: route policy, SQL evidence, strict diagnostics
cards.why: Not promoted; conservative guard available behind flag only.

cards.downstream_effect: Reduces context/token cost while preserving packaged behavior.
cards.why: Promoted because strict score tied/improved safely with large token reduction.

cards.downstream_effect: Builds Parquet-derived evidence objects for grounding.
cards.input: DBSnapshot parquet data and schema metadata
cards.why: Coverage exists, but score impact is currently 0.

cards.downstream_effect: Caches deterministic retrieval/index artifacts.
cards.why: Infrastructure; no standalone score claim.

cards.downstream_effect: Carries SQL/API/local evidence into answer synthesis.
cards.why: Safety layer for supportable answers.

cards.downstream_effect: Summarizes schema/API/domain hints for compact prompts.
cards.why: Core compact context mechanism.

cards.downstream_effect: Handles simple deterministic query families with low overhead.
cards.why: Efficiency-oriented infrastructure.

cards.downstream_effect: Limits SQL/API calls for efficiency and trajectory stability.
cards.why: Keeps tool calls within packaged efficiency target.

cards.downstream_effect: Decides when SQL/API evidence is sufficient or API is required.
cards.why: Promoted core safety/answerability gate.

cards.downstream_effect: Deduplicates and budgets plan steps before execution.
cards.why: Efficiency and safety support for packaged strategy.

cards.downstream_effect: Tests smaller context windows under strict gates.
cards.why: Not promoted under current safety constraints.

cards.downstream_effect: Evaluates repaired plans without enabling repair execution.
cards.why: Not promoted because repaired candidates did not pass gates.

cards.downstream_effect: Tests AST quality as a tie-break for SQL candidates.
cards.why: Kept shadow-only because no alternatives existed.

cards.downstream_effect: Shadow-tests deterministic preference for high-confidence ranked endpoint family.
cards.why: Kept shadow-only because projected positive delta rows = 0.

cards.downstream_effect: Reports whether real Adobe credentials and live API payload readiness exist.
cards.why: Credential visibility is false, so this remains diagnostic.

cards.downstream_effect: Checks paraphrase/hidden-style routing robustness.
cards.why: Prevents weakening schema/family routing robustness; current report passes 48/48.

cards.downstream_effect: Rejects query-id, exact-query, gold-path, or answer-memorization behavior.
cards.why: Required gate for all accuracy experiments.

cards.downstream_effect: Checks final answer support and consistency.
cards.why: Core answer safety check.

cards.downstream_effect: Ranks candidate answer phrasings when alternatives are available.
cards.why: Used as packaged answer-selection support.

cards.downstream_effect: Extracts answer shape, requested facts, and diagnostic slots.
cards.why: Supports evidence-bound answer generation.

cards.downstream_effect: Verifies packaged outputs and final submission readiness.
cards.why: Final readiness gate remains passing in winner report.

cards.downstream_effect: Prevents credential leakage in packaged outputs/reports.
cards.why: Required readiness gate.

cards.downstream_effect: Records execution checkpoints for explainability and auditability.
cards.why: Core observability surface used by these visualizations.

cards.downstream_effect: Uses LLM proposals only for evidence-cited answer rewrites.
cards.input: baseline answer and local evidence registry
cards.why: Kept shadow-only; safe rows = 0.

cards.downstream_effect: Validates claim citations, dry-run unavailable wording, and SQL/API hash invariance.
cards.why: Safe rows feed isolated trials only.

cards.downstream_effect: Runs isolated packaged-style trials over safe candidate bundles.
cards.output: best isolated score and gate results
cards.why: Best isolated score improved but target 0.75 was not reached.

cards.downstream_effect: Checkpointed gate that sends evidence questions into the backend pipeline.
cards.why: Part of the packaged prompt routing path.

cards.downstream_effect: Provider-agnostic SDK baseline for OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic LLM comparisons.
cards.input: dev prompts plus configured SDK backend metadata
cards.output: shadow baseline trajectories and strict comparison reports
cards.why: Current SDK LLM baseline is a comparison framework; deterministic SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY remains packaged.
